rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black leading-none

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy - use 2x standard padding (e.g. p-8 or p-12 for sections).

components.navigation: Crystal Glass sticky header. z-50. Backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0a0a0a]/70 border-b border-white/10. Include Logo, Nav links, and 'Pro' CTA.

buttons.primary: bg-[#d97736] text-[#0a0a0a] font-bold hover:bg-[#f2a900] transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-3
buttons.mic_button: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#d97736] text-[#0a0a0a] flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(217,119,54,0.4)] hover:scale-105 transition-transform

components.scenario_cards: Use Shadcn Card. MUST be min-h-[400px]. Background image covering full card. Add bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0a0a0a] via-[#0a0a0a]/80 to-transparent for text readability. Content packed at bottom.

chat_interface.ai_bubble: Glassmorphism surface. Text left aligned. Avatar next to bubble.
chat_interface.user_bubble: Solid bg-[#3f3f46] or bg-[#d97736] with text-[#0a0a0a]. Text right aligned.
chat_interface.tone_indicator: Use Shadcn Badge with varied colors depending on tone (e.g., Red for Angry, Blue for Formal).

components.forms: Use Shadcn Input/Select. bg-[#141414] border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#d97736] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#d97736].
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react. Duotone or bold weights.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has minimum 4.5:1 ratio using dark gradient overlays.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-roleplay-button').

hero.description: Cinematic close-up of people talking, use as background for landing page hero section.

texture.description: Dark cinematic film grain texture. Use as subtle background repeating pattern or overlay in chat views.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi fonts via Fontshare or similar webfont loader if possible, else fallback to Inter/system fonts ONLY if webfonts fail.
Use framer-motion for page transitions and micro-interactions.
Implement the Scenario Selection as a Bento grid with image backgrounds. DO NOT use generic colored cards.
For the chat interface, make the UI feel like a 'Simulator' rather than a standard messaging app. Use the cinematic_texture image as a subtle background pattern behind the chat messages.
Ensure the microphone button is visually distinct, using the brand.primary color (#d97736).
Use pure Tailwind + standard HTML for marketing/landing pages; use heavily customized Shadcn for the Dashboard, Auth, and Chat UI.
